basics.name: Aşkın Kadir Çekim
basics.label: Computer Science Student & Founder
basics.summary: CS student at KIT and founder of Tesseract, a paid AI education product I built and shipped end-to-end (iOS app, backend, and a media-generation pipeline). Focused on applied LLM systems and full-stack product engineering.

work.name: Tesseract
work.summary: Founder and sole engineer of an AI education platform that turns a photo of a math problem into a step-by-step animated video explanation. Shipped to production on a paid subscription.
highlights: Architected and built the product end-to-end across a native iOS app, a TypeScript/Bun backend, and a separate media-generation service

Built an automated pipeline that turns a math problem into a narrated, animated video — parsing the problem, generating programmatic animations, synthesizing voice narration, and compositing into a vertical video
Engineered an LLM orchestration layer producing structured mixed-media responses (text, tables, charts, diagrams, code) with multi-provider fallback, on PostgreSQL (Neon) and DigitalOcean

work.name: OmmaWorks
work.summary: Drove AI integration and workflow automation across departments.
highlights: Integrated LLM-based tools into daily operations to automate internal workflows and speed up cross-department tasks
Built and maintained BI dashboards (Retool, later Metabase) to enable data-driven decision-making

projects.name: Proactive EV Co-Pilot
projects.description: AI-powered EV trip planner for multi-stop routing
highlights: Winner, Mercedes-Benz Tech Innovation Hackathon — built a full prototype for multi-stop EV routing (Flutter, HERE APIs, preference-based ranking, LLM intent parser)

projects.name: Twinify — AI Digital Twin for WhatsApp
projects.description: AI twin that mirrors personality and voice on WhatsApp
highlights: Winner (LLMs & Vision models track), Nosu AI Hackathon — integrated OpenAI GPT and ElevenLabs voice cloning with a SQLite memory layer
